directive: Recurring AI-worker tasks must be durable, owner-visible, and proof-backed. A recurring task is not complete because it was scheduled; it closes only with the required email Message-ID, domain record ID/readback, explicit no-action reason, or one exact owner question.

defaults.proof_required_default: owner-visible email Message-ID plus task/domain readback or one exact blocker
defaults.escalation_path: Task Manager repair at 5 minutes; AI Health escalation at 10 minutes; no handled/filed closeout without Message-ID or explicit no-action proof.

verification.structured_recurrence_fields: Task Flow report now emits parent_packet_id plus recurrence_* fields, and the repeating-tasks / Task Flow pages prefer the structured fields with prose fallback for legacy packets.
verification.report_readback: 2026-05-12 live report readback includes recurrence data on upcoming scheduled packets and owner-reply rows.

tasks.cadence: Quarterly, on the 15th of the month following each quarter, at 8:00 AM America/Chicago.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Email Robert the sales team bonus report summary and link for the completed quarter.
tasks.proof_required: Naomi email Message-ID plus report date range and salesreport URL readback.
tasks.next_update: Create/focus Naomi repeating task before the next quarter-close due date.

tasks.cadence: Every payroll cycle, 5 days before the payroll run date, at 8:00 AM America/Chicago.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Email Robert the COTeam bonus report summary and link for the payroll period.
tasks.proof_required: Naomi email Message-ID plus payroll date, period range, and salesreport URL readback.
tasks.next_update: Task Manager must resolve payroll calendar dates into due reminders before the next payroll run.

tasks.human_owner_or_recipient: COTeam shift recipients; Robert copied when requested
tasks.cadence: Weekly and whenever this week's open OPS shifts change materially.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Send clear open-shift emails for this week's unclaimed COTeam shifts with claim instructions.
tasks.proof_required: Vanessa email Message-ID(s), shift IDs/date/time/account readback, and OPS open-shift state after send.
tasks.next_update: Existing Vanessa open-shifts lane must return sent proof or one exact blocker.

tasks.cadence: Weekdays at end of day unless Robert suppresses it.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Email Robert a human-readable Frank EOD showing what was actually completed, what changed, what was not done, and remaining decisions.
tasks.proof_required: Frank email Message-ID plus source readback from daily inputs, Task Flow, sent logs, and automation logs.
tasks.next_update: Frank EOD content must not use stale sources or empty 'no completed TODO' language when live work exists.

tasks.cadence: Weekdays at end of day unless Sonat or Robert suppresses it.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Email Sonat an updated Avignon EOD in SOP voice with completed work, changes, unfinished items, and next actions.
tasks.proof_required: Avignon email Message-ID plus source readback from daily inputs, Task Flow, sent logs, and automation logs.
tasks.next_update: Existing Avignon updated EOD lane must return sent proof or one exact blocker.

tasks.cadence: Weekly, every Monday at 8:15 AM America/Chicago.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Audit the AI Manager input writer and legacy event trail for stale or missing rows, then nudge Task Manager if the DB surfaces or daily-input replay drift apart.
tasks.proof_required: Weekly audit readback showing current ai_manager_inputs and ai_manager_input_events tails, or one exact blocker.
tasks.next_update: Keep the daily-input Markdown trail and legacy DB event trail aligned; no Robert email unless a real blocker or owner question appears.

tasks.cadence: Weekly, every Monday at 8:30 AM America/Chicago.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Compare the current daily-input Markdown files against the legacy ai_manager_input_events table and backfill any missing rows.
tasks.proof_required: Legacy event-tail readback, backfill count, or one exact blocker.
tasks.next_update: Re-run the backfill command only if a live gap appears; otherwise report clean parity and stop.

tasks.requested_deliverable: Draft the weekly highlights communication packet for the current week, keeping Marketing Manager as the role owner and using Vanessa only when the actual send path is National Outreach.
tasks.proof_required: Owner-visible Message-ID plus source readback, or one exact blocker.
tasks.next_update: Keep OPS tasks 369887 and 369888 plus Forge planner row 88 in sync as the wording evolves.

tasks.requested_deliverable: Draft the social posting communication packet for the current week, keeping Marketing Manager as the role owner and using Vanessa only when the actual send path is National Outreach.
tasks.proof_required: Owner-visible Message-ID plus source readback, or one exact blocker.
tasks.next_update: Keep OPS tasks 369889 and 369890 plus Forge planner row 89 in sync as the wording evolves.

tasks.cadence: Daily, every day at 7:00 AM America/Chicago.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Run the daily AI box backup task wrapper, create the local metadata backup, push it to the approved .205 route, warn Robert by email if the remote push fails, and on success advance OPS task 369899 to the next daily due date.
tasks.proof_required: Local backup path, remote_push_status, warning_email_status on failure, and OPS due-date readback showing task 369899 moved to the next daily date on success.
tasks.next_update: Keep OPS task 369899, HANDOFF, and the backup warning path aligned with the latest successful backup path, remote status, and next daily due date.

tasks.cadence: Weekly, aligned to the live OPS due date cadence for task 370070.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Verify the most recent Codex backup artifact and the daily backup lane readback, confirm whether OPS task 369899 remains wired correctly, and report one exact proof line or blocker.
tasks.proof_required: Latest local backup artifact readback, live OPS readback for task 369899 recurrence/due date, and one exact verification outcome for task 370070.
tasks.next_update: Keep OPS task 370070, OPS task 369899, and the weekly backup verification readback aligned so overdue weekly verification does not drift from the real daily backup lane.

tasks.cadence: Weekly, every Monday at 8:45 AM America/Chicago.
tasks.requested_deliverable: Review recent inputs from Robert, Sonat, and other recurring owners for repeatable workflows, then create or update Codex skills when the same how-to keeps reappearing.
tasks.proof_required: Weekly review readback, created/updated skill references, or one exact blocker.
tasks.next_update: Keep the OPS task, repeating-task record, and skill creation log aligned with newly derived skills.
